name: Is workers comp or personal injury lawsuit better after forklift hit?
description: Comp for basics (no-fault); lawsuit third-parties for extras—combine for most money.

mainEntity.name: Is workers comp or personal injury lawsuit better after forklift hit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for basics (no-fault); lawsuit third-parties for extras—combine for most money.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp first for quick no-fault medical/wages; sue third-parties additionally for pain/suffering.** Comp limits benefits.[6][7] Key factors: Comp no litigation but caps; suits yield higher for severe injuries like $20M verdict.[2] Comp required in UT/ID. Layer both for max recovery via attorney.
